register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Start your journey with NatureQuery
register.terms: By creating an account, you agree to our
register.successMessage: Please check your email inbox for a verification link. You must verify your email before you can sign in.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to reset your password
forgotPassword.successMessage: Password reset link sent! Check your email.
forgotPassword.pageSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgotPassword.accountExists: If an account exists for {{email}}, we've sent a password reset link.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password
resetPassword.invalidLinkMessage: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.
resetPassword.passwordUpdatedMessage: Your password has been reset successfully.
resetPassword.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

verifyEmail.title: Verify Email
verifyEmail.successMessage: You can now sign in to your account.
verifyEmail.verifiedMessage: Your email has been verified successfully. You can now use all features.

hero.title: Ask your database
hero.subtitle: NatureQuery converts natural language questions into SQL queries, executes them on your database, and exports the results — no SQL knowledge required.

features.title: Everything you need to query your data
features.subtitle: From natural language processing to enterprise security, NatureQuery has you covered.

nlp.title: Natural Language to SQL
nlp.description: Ask questions in plain English. Our AI converts them to optimized SQL queries instantly.

multiDb.title: Multi-Database Support
multiDb.description: Connect to PostgreSQL, MySQL, or SQLite. Switch between databases seamlessly.

export.title: Export to Excel & CSV
export.description: Download query results as formatted Excel spreadsheets or CSV files with one click.

visualization.title: Data Visualization
visualization.description: Auto-generate bar, line, and pie charts from your query results. No configuration needed.

team.title: Team Collaboration
team.description: Create teams, invite members, share connections and saved queries with role-based access.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: AES-256 encryption, audit logging, API key management, and rate limiting built in.

demo.title: NatureQuery Dashboard
demo.exampleQuestion: Show me the top 10 customers by total order value this year

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps to go from question to insight
howItWorks.step1Description: Securely connect to PostgreSQL, MySQL, or SQLite. Your credentials are encrypted with AES-256.
howItWorks.step2Description: Type your question naturally. Our AI understands your schema and generates optimized SQL.
howItWorks.step3Description: View results in tables or charts. Export to Excel or CSV with one click.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more

cta.title: Ready to talk to your database?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of teams using NatureQuery to get insights from their data in seconds.

footer.tagline: Natural language to SQL, made simple.

queryPanel.title: Ask a Question
queryPanel.placeholder: What would you like to know about your data?
queryPanel.placeholderConnected:
Describe what data you want in plain English...

Examples:
- Show me all customers from New York
- What are the top 5 products by sales?
- Find orders placed in the last 30 days
queryPanel.placeholderNoConnection: Connect to a database to start querying...
queryPanel.validated: Validated: SELECT-only query, safe to execute
queryPanel.connectDescription: Connect your PostgreSQL, MySQL, or SQLite database to start querying with natural language.
queryPanel.sqlEditorDescription: Write and execute SQL directly with full syntax highlighting

header.shareDescription: Create a public link to share your dashboard charts with your team or clients. They won't see your raw data or SQL.
header.failedToShare: Failed to change dashboard sharing setting

connectionSidebar.deleteConfirmText: Are you sure you want to delete
connectionSidebar.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. All saved queries and history associated with this connection will be permanently removed.

sidebar.historyNoResults: No results found for your search/filters.

schemaBrowser.connectToDatabase: Connect to a database to browse tables

history.title: Query History
history.question: Question
history.yourRecent: Your recent queries will appear here

savedQueries.title: Saved Queries
savedQueries.clickBookmark: Click the bookmark icon on a generated query to save it.

scheduler.title: Scheduled Queries
scheduler.subtitle: Automate your reports to run on a schedule
scheduler.noSchedulesHint: Run a query and schedule it to automate your reports
scheduler.name: Name
scheduler.infoText: Scheduled queries will run automatically and send results to your selected notification channels.

security.title: Security Settings
security.description: Manage your account security and authentication methods
security.changePasswordDesc: Update your password regularly to keep your account secure.
security.dangerZoneDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Manage your plan and billing details
billing.freeForever: Free forever — no credit card required
billing.stripeNotConfigured: Stripe is not configured. Set STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and price IDs in your environment to enable billing.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.revokeConfirm: Revoke this API key? Any applications using it will stop working.
apiKeys.copyKeyNow: Copy your API key now. It won't be shown again.
apiKeys.noKeysDesc: Create an API key to access NatureQuery programmatically.
apiKeys.usageDesc: Include your API key in the Authorization header:

welcome.title: Welcome to NatureQuery!
welcome.subtitle: Let's get you set up in just a few steps.
welcome.description: NatureQuery lets you query databases using plain English. No SQL knowledge needed.
welcome.askPlainExample: Show me all orders from last week
welcome.instantResultsSub: AI generates and runs the query for you

step1.title: Connect Your Database
step1.subtitle: Add your first database connection to get started.

step2.title: Try Your First Query
step2.subtitle: Ask a question in plain English and see the magic happen.
step2.description: Add your first database connection, or try the demo to explore.

complete.title: You're All Set!
complete.subtitle: Start exploring your data with natural language.
complete.dbConnected: Your database is connected. Head to the dashboard to start asking questions.
complete.noDatabase: Head to the dashboard to connect a database and start querying with natural language.
complete.exampleQuery: Show me all customers who signed up this month

checklist.allSetDescription: You've completed all onboarding steps. Happy querying!

steps.connectedDbDesc: Link a PostgreSQL, MySQL, or SQLite database — or try the sandbox.
steps.askedFirstQuestionDesc: Type a question in plain English and let AI generate the SQL.
steps.pinnedChart: Pin a chart to your dashboard
steps.pinnedChartDesc: Visualize query results and pin them for quick access.
steps.invitedTeamMemberDesc: Collaboration is better together. Add someone from your team.
steps.setupScheduleDesc: Automate recurring queries with email delivery.
